display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
reject + planner_fixes
reset planner/workers/...
replan up to MAX_VALIDATION_REPLAN_RETRIES

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(63, 53, 37) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(63, 53, 37) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Runtime settings
DEEP_AGENT_PIPELINE_NAME
DEEP_AGENT_ARCHITECTURE_NAME
validator_review_level
shell_execution_mode

div.style: color: rgb(33, 65, 50) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Workflow config JSON
pipeline_presets.json
architecture_presets.json
stage_kind_metadata.json
stage_output_contracts.json

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
get_runtime_sync(...)
MultiAgentRuntime
{pipeline_name,
worker_architecture_name,
stages[],
static_tool_ids,
dynamic_tool_ids,
sandbox_tool_ids}

div.style: color: rgb(63, 53, 37) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
build_stage_prompt()
stage input payload
{user_text,
prior_stage_outputs,
stage contract,
architecture,
shared_state}

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
preflight
light tool-backed reconnaissance
output: short handoff
+ validated_sample_path

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
planner
planning only
output text + JSON block
[{id, objective,
recommended_roles,
evidence_targets}]

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
workers
host-parallel assignment execution
assignment payload:
{index, work_item,
slot_name, archetype_name}
output: evidence bundle
+ optional GHIDRA/YARA proposal blocks

div.style: color: rgb(59, 46, 87) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
MCP tool layer
artifact/live Ghidra, strings,
FLOSS, capa, hashdb, yara, ...
request: {tool_name, args}
response: text/json

div.style: color: rgb(89, 45, 45) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
validators
review only
output JSON gate
{decision, signoff_count,
required_signoffs,
accepted_findings,
rejected_findings,
rejection_reasons,
planner_fixes, summary}

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
reporter
synthesis only
output: final report
+ optional finalized proposal blocks

div.style: color: rgb(33, 65, 50) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
shared_state
{validated_sample_path,
pipeline_stage_progress,
planned_work_items,
planned_work_item_status,
ghidra_change_proposals,
generated_yara_rules,
validation_history,
model_usage_events,
final_output}

div.style: color: rgb(63, 53, 37) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Pipeline return
final_output string
shared_state snapshots
status_log + tool_log_sections
